studio-concept-artist.title: Concept Artist
studio-concept-artist.shortDescription: We're looking for a concept artist for the studio at large. You'll work across all our active projects, defining characters, environments, and visual elements from the earliest stages.
requirements: Portfolio with character and/or environment concept art
Ability to work in different styles depending on the project
Skill for translating vague ideas into clear visual references
Availability to collaborate continuously across multiple teams
offer: Visible credit on every project you contribute to
Real variety: one day Tonkori, the next Afterlight, the next something new
Direct influence on the studio's visual identity from the very start

studio-community-manager.title: Community Manager for the studio
studio-community-manager.shortDescription: We're looking for a Community Manager to build and nurture Rhon Studios' community. You'll manage our social media, connect with our audience, and help give the studio a voice as we grow.
requirements: Experience managing social media (Instagram, X/Twitter, TikTok, Discord, etc.)
Ability to create engaging content consistent with the studio's identity
Strong communication skills, both approachable and professional, with the community
Organization and consistency to maintain an active presence over time
Previous experience in video game or indie project marketing is a plus
offer: Official credit on the projects you take part in
Revenue share if the project generates profit after launch
Priority for future paid positions as the studio grows
Real-world experience managing the community of an indie studio in development
100% remote, flexible collaboration, compatible with studies or work
Personalized letter of recommendation upon finishing your collaboration

afterlight-artist.title: 2D Artist for Afterlight
afterlight-artist.shortDescription: We're looking for a 2D artist to help bring to life the contrast between light and shadow that defines Afterlight. You'll work hand in hand with design to build the world's visual identity.
requirements: Portfolio with 2D illustration or pixel art
Sensitivity for atmosphere and light/contrast handling
Ability to work within style guides and maintain visual consistency
Availability to collaborate on an ongoing basis (not just occasionally)
offer: Visible credit as the project's artist
Creative freedom within the art direction
Being part of a small team with fast, direct decision-making

afterlight-leveldesigner.title: Level / Puzzle Designer for Afterlight
afterlight-leveldesigner.shortDescription: We need someone who thinks in terms of space, rhythm, and puzzle-solving to build the levels of a metroidvania where light and shadow change the rules of the game.
requirements: Experience or portfolio in level design, ideally in platformers/metroidvanias
Ability to design puzzles with a progressive difficulty curve
Basic knowledge of prototyping tools (Tiled, the project's engine, etc.)
Analytical thinking to balance exploration and challenge
offer: Credit as the project's designer
Direct collaboration with programming and art from early stages
Opportunity to define mechanics, not just implement them

afterlight-programmer.title: Support Programmer for Afterlight
afterlight-programmer.shortDescription: If you have experience in gameplay programming and want to contribute to a metroidvania in development, there's room for occasional or ongoing support depending on your availability.
requirements: Knowledge of the engine used by the project
Experience with gameplay systems (movement, collisions, states)
Good communication skills for working in a small team
offer: Credit as a project collaborator
Flexible commitment based on your availability
Direct work with the core team

other-artist.title: Artist for Small Projects
other-artist.shortDescription: We're looking for a versatile artist to join short-cycle small projects. Ideal for someone who wants to experiment with different styles and see their work shipped fast.
requirements: Varied portfolio (a single style is not required)
Ability to adapt to short, varied projects
Comfort working with tight deadlines
offer: Visible credit on every launched project
Freedom to propose style and visual direction
Short cycles: you see your work finished and published quickly

other-designer.title: Game Designer for Small Projects
other-designer.shortDescription: Join us to design compact mechanics and experiences in small projects built to ship fast, before scaling up to the studio's bigger titles.
requirements: Interest in rapid prototyping and simple but polished mechanics
Ability to iterate with constant feedback
No prior published experience required, but commitment is a must
offer: Credit as designer on each project
Space to experiment without the pressure of a large project
Opportunity to grow alongside the studio toward bigger projects

other-narrator.title: Narrator / Writer for Small Projects
other-narrator.shortDescription: We're looking for someone who enjoys telling compact, emotionally resonant stories in short formats — ideal for experimenting with voice and narrative structure.
requirements: Strong writing skills in Spanish (dialogues, in-game text)
Ability to tell complete stories in brief formats
Openness to feedback and working in a small team
offer: Credit as narrator/writer on the project
Creative freedom in tone and narrative structure
Fast publication: your story reaches players quickly

tonkori.name: Tonkori
tonkori.shortDescription: Tonkori is a narrative 2D RPG where every decision leaves a mark. Your choices shape the story, your bonds with companions, and the way the world responds to you. No two playthroughs are alike — only the one you build.

afterlight.name: Afterlight
afterlight.shortDescription: Afterlight is a metroidvania where light and shadow don't clash — they coexist. Explore a world that shifts depending on how you move between both.

studio.name: Studio
studio.shortDescription: Cross-cutting roles that sustain the studio as a whole: communication, community, management, and everything that keeps the Rhon Studios ecosystem alive beyond the games.

other.name: Others
other.shortDescription: Smaller, experimental, or side projects where we test ideas, mechanics, and styles outside our main titles.
